---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. -->

## What's the use case?

<!-- Why do you need this? What problem does it solve? What are you trying to do that you currently can't? -->

## What should it do?

<!-- Describe the behavior you want. Be specific about inputs, outputs, and edge cases. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- If you have an idea for how to implement it, sketch it out here. Code snippets, API shapes, or UI mockups all help. -->

```ts
// Example API or pseudo-code
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other ways could this be solved? Why are they worse? -->

## Why doesn't the current version handle it?

<!-- What's missing today? Is there a partial workaround? -->

## Priority

How important is this for you?

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important for my workflow
- [ ] Blocking — I can't use Quaesitor without it

## Is this on the roadmap?

<!-- Check ROADMAP.md and link the relevant section if so. If not, that's fine — explain why it should be added. -->

- [ ] Yes — see [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) section: <!-- link here -->
- [ ] No, but it should be considered
- [ ] Not sure

## Environment (optional)

- **Quaesitor version**:
- **How are you running it?**: <!-- local | Docker | hosted -->
- **OS / Browser**:

## Mockups / References (optional)

<!-- Drag screenshots, link to similar features in other tools, or describe the visual design. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Related issues, discussions, or context. -->

---

**Before submitting:**

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions for duplicates.
- [ ] I have explained the **use case** clearly (not just the implementation).
- [ ] I have considered alternatives and explained why this approach is better.
